title: How to watch best UFO documentaries- From Age of Disclosure to S4: The Bob Lazar Story
description: The legacy media may have been UFO averse for decades but the idea that governments have been hiding the truth is now hitting the mainstream. Here are 10 of the "best UFO docs".

title: Country singer’s UFO story eerily similar to Charlie Kirk’s in 2024: ‘Keep it weird’
description: Kirk shared a weird video from his plane following the 2024 Penn State-Wisconsin game.

title: UFO sighting? Singer Kacey Musgraves spots three mysterious orbs mid-flight, pilots say they’ve seen them too
description: Singer Kacey Musgraves had an interesting flight journey whe she spotted not one or two, but three mysterious orbs mid-flight. She has shared the video showing the orbs. However, what's interesting is that pilots have agreed with her.

title: UFO Cover-Up At 50k Feet? Kacey Musgraves Claims Mystery Orbs Trailed Her Plane
description: UFO Cover-Up At 50k Feet? Kacey Musgraves Claims Mystery Orbs Trailed Her Plane

title: Mysterious Flashes in 1950s Skies Linked to Nuclear Tests and UAP Sightings: Study
description: A new statistical analysis of archival sky surveys from the early Cold War has found that mysterious, short-lived bursts of light in the night sky were more likely to appear around the time of above-ground nuclear weapons tests and to increase alongside reports of unexplained aerial phenomena (UAPs).
